code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  while i < n and idx < 2
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      mut acc = 0
      while i < n
        mut cb = 0
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(v)
          cb = v
        when None
          cb = -1
        end
        if cb >= 48 and cb <= 57
          acc = acc * 10 + (cb - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
        if i == n
          i = n + 1
        end
      end
      if idx == 0
        nums = [acc, 0]
      else
        nums = [nums[0], acc]
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      i = i + 1
    else
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  mut a = nums[0]
  mut b = nums[1]
  while b != 0
    let t = a % b
    a = b
    b = t
  end
  print("gcd=#{a}")
  Ok(())
end
